title: Fun YouTube Podcast Editing
brief: I have raw footage from my latest YouTube podcast and I want it shaped into an engaging episode that flows smoothly from start to finish. The job is straightforward: trim unwanted pauses or stumbles, add clean transitions between segments, and weave in light-hearted graphics or effects that match a casual, fun vibe rather than a stiff corporate look. Please incorporate my existing logo whenever it naturally fits—typically in the intro, a lower-third, or the end screen—so the branding feels consistent without overpowering the content. Deliverables should include: • A fully edited 1080p (or higher, if the source allows) video ready for upload to YouTube. • The project file (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve—whichever you use) so I can make minor tweaks later if needed. • Any custom graphic assets you create, delivered separately in PNG/transparent or vector format. Smooth audio levels and synced visuals are a must, but no elaborate sound design is required beyond ensuring voices are clear and balanced. If this sounds like your kind of creative edit, let’s get started!
